prompts.name: Song Analysis Worksheet
prompts.user_prompt_template: Create a Song Analysis Worksheet for the song "{SONG}" by {ARTIST}. Level: {LEVEL}. Provide: song_context (what the song is about), vocabulary_from_lyrics (10 words with meanings), pronunciation_focus (3 interesting sounds/links in the lyrics), chorus_shadowing_guide (annotated chorus), comprehension_questions (5), cultural_notes (if relevant), writing_extension (use a phrase from the song in your own sentence). Return JSON.

prompts.name: Movie Scene Transcript Activity
prompts.trigger: 2x per week for Levels L1+, once for L0 Week 5+
prompts.user_prompt_template: Create a Movie Scene Activity for Level {LEVEL}. Scene description: {SCENE_DESC}. Provide: scene_summary (what happens), transcript (dialogue with speaker labels, max 20 lines), vocabulary_highlight (5 new words from the scene), connected_speech_notes (where linking/reduction happens), comprehension_questions (5), shadow_lines (3 lines to practice), discussion_question (1 opinion question about the scene). Return JSON.
